idioma_desc: Select the desired language for the calendar:
erro_idioma: Error loading language. Check your connection.
hint_escreva: What did God speak to your heart today?
hint_gravar:
What did God speak to your heart today?
(Tap the microphone to record)
internet_necessaria: Internet connection required to load language (~300 KB).
nenhuma_fala_detectada: No speech detected for too long
reconhecimento_indisponivel: Speech recognition unavailable on this device
config_copyright_desc:

copyright_active:
World English Bible (WEB):
English translation in the Public Domain.
future_msg_1: This devotional is still reserved for the right day. Come back on %s and walk with us in this reflection.
future_msg_2: The time has not yet come for this word. We await you on %s to live this devotional with us.
future_msg_3: Each day has its portion. This message will be available on %s. Until then, stand firm in faith.
future_msg_4: The Word of God has direction for every season. Come back on %s to receive the reflection for this day.
future_msg_5: This content will be released at the right time. We look forward to seeing you on %s for another moment with God.
future_msg_6: Today is not yet the day for this reflection. Come back on %s; we will have a word prepared to strengthen your walk.
future_msg_7: The devotional for this day is still kept. Return on %s and continue this journey of faith with us.
future_msg_8: There is a special message prepared for this day. It will be available on %s. We look forward to seeing you.
future_msg_9: One step a day, one word at a time. This devotional will be available on %s.
future_msg_10: This reflection has not yet been opened. Come back on %s and join us for another moment of meditation on the Word.
future_msg_11: God speaks at the right time. This devotional will be available on %s. Keep walking with us.
future_msg_12: The journey continues, but this day is still ahead. We await you on %s for a new reflection.
future_msg_13: This content will be revealed on the right day. Come back on %s to meditate with us.
future_msg_14: We are still waiting for this day to arrive. When it is %s, this reflection will be available for you.
future_msg_15: The devotional for this day is reserved. Come back on %s and receive the message prepared for this date.
future_msg_16: Each day brings its own blessings. We look forward to seeing you here on %s to continue our daily journey of faith and reflection!
future_msg_17: Today already has God's care. Rest your heart and prepare, for on %s we will have a new word for you!
future_msg_18: A new message of faith and encouragement is being prepared. It will be available for you on %s.
future_msg_19: The devotional for %s will be available soon. We await you with love to share another special moment.
